hotel_name: Assila, a Luxury Collection Hotel, Jeddah
raw_description:
Offering a rooftop outdoor pool and spa centre Assila Hotel is located in Jeddah in the Makkah Al Mukarramah Province Region, 1.4 km from Jeddah Mall. Guests can enjoy the on-site bar. Free WiFi is available throughout the entire property.

All rooms feature air-conditioning, a flat-screen TV and a seating area. Some rooms feature a kitchenette and a dining table. The private bathrooms are fitted with a shower and tub and offer free toiletries, bathrobes, slippers and a hairdryer.

There is a 24-hour front desk, a business centre, hairdresser's, and shops at the property.

Stars Avenue Mall is 4.3 km from Assila Hotel, while King Fahad Fountain is 4.4 km from the property. The nearest airport is King Abdulaziz International Airport, 13 km from Assila Hotel.

Couples particularly like the location — they rated it9.4for a two-person trip.

description: Experience clinical levels of high-end luxury at Assila, a Luxury Collection Hotel, Jeddah. Located conveniently in its prime location, this property features 11 key amenities including Outdoor swimming pool, Free WiFi, Free parking.
